data.title: Bavarian Nordic – Transactions in Connection with Share Buy-Back Program
data.description: Bavarian Nordic A/S has disclosed updates on their share buy-back initiative, initiated on March 12, 2026. The company, listed as OMX: BAVA, plans to repurchase shares totaling up to DKK 200 million between March 12, 2026, and May 13, 2026. This buy-back program is conducted in compliance with the Safe Harbour Regulation, encompassing Regulation (EU) No. 596/2014 and Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052.

data.title: Dow Dips Over 250 Points: Investor Sentiment Declines, Greed Index Remains In 'Fear' Zone
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index showed a minor uptick in fear levels, continuing to hold in the "Fear" zone on Friday. U.S. stocks closed lower that day, with the Dow Jones index declining over 250 points as the University of Michigan's consumer sentiment index hit a record low in April. Additionally, the March monthly inflation rate surged to 0.9%, marking the highest increase since June 2022. Trump declared intentions to disrupt ship traffic associated with Iran through the Strait of Hormuz post the inconclusive Islamabad peace talks over the weekend. Notably, Organon & Co. (NASDAQ: OGN) shares soared by 28% on Friday. Find more details on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bank of Korea implements cryptocurrency 'circuit breakers' following Bithumb's error of sending 620,000 Bitcoin instead of Korean won.
data.description: In February, Bithumb mistakenly transferred 620,000 Bitcoin to customers instead of 620,000 Korean won. This error has prompted the Bank of Korea to urge lawmakers to implement measures to prevent such incidents in the future.

data.title: Haisco Enters into Exclusive License Agreement with AbbVie to Develop Novel Medicines for Pain
data.description: Beijing - Haisco Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. (Stock Symbol: 002653) revealed on April 10, 2026, a new exclusive licensing deal with AbbVie (Stock Symbol: ABBV), a multinational biopharmaceutical firm. The agreement involves Haisco providing certain rights to AbbVie in exchange for undisclosed benefits.

data.title: BC.GAME Native Token $BC Hits All-Time High Following Launch of BC Engine
data.description: Belize City - BC.GAME revealed that its platform token, $BC, hit a peak of $0.01181 on April 12, 2026, the highest value recorded since its introduction. Statistics indicate a significant increase of 12.13% within a 24-hour period and a striking 305% surge from its earlier price level.

data.title: Share buyback programme – week 15
data.description: The Danish Financial Supervisory Authority has announced cooperation with Nasdaq Copenhagen, Euronext Dublin, and the London Stock Exchange. This collaboration involves various stakeholders in the financial sector. The aim is to enhance oversight and regulatory measures within the market. The initiative seeks to increase transparency, compliance, and investor protection. The involvement of key players, including major stock exchanges and regulatory bodies, indicates a significant step towards ensuring financial market integrity.
